articles.heading: April Fools Morph Competition
articles.summary: The Factions Hub Events Team has hosted a morph competition in the theme of April Fools.

articles.author: Director of News, Sur
articles.heading: We are so back
articles.summary: The FH News team is making a comeback with weekly updates and monthly highlights, Additionally FH news Apps are now open

articles.author: poohtoast | 1442461366983196804
articles.heading: Events Team Application
articles.summary: The Factions Hub Events Team has released their entrance applications to the public, offering players an opportunity to contribute to the community.

body.content: The results are in. Acting Events Team leader, *controlpowerz* (333520455535427584), officially announced the winners of the Factions Hub April Fools Morph Competition earlier this week, after receiving many unique and fun submissions from dozens of community members.

The competition invited server members to create unique morphs based on the theme “April Fools”, with the top three submissions receiving Robux prizes, and first place being awarded the exclusive Event Winner Role.

And so, the winners are…
1st Place - *dambaine* (810878462252023848), with their silly yet suave Autumn Tree outfit.
2nd Place - *Geraldhoo01* (704929649884659773), with their hilarious pickle-themed costume.
3rd Place - *robery98765* (804438826301784116), with their mischevious trollface-themed creation.

The event drew positive engagement from the community, with many participants showcasing their designs and celebrating the playful spirit of the competition. Congratulations to the winners and well done to all who participated.

Interested in checking out the submissions for yourself? Check them out in the official Factions Hub Discord events channel.

body.label: Check out the submissions for yourself!

articles.author: a_suscat | 1044186076639670283
articles.heading: Site-416’s 4th Anniversary
articles.summary: As of 5 April 2026, Site-416 marked its 4th anniversary. The community has grown to over 12,000 members and stands as one of the oldest communities in SCP:RP still running today.
